name: How Will I Ever Race Again...?
description:
《Terror! The First Circle of Hell!》🔮

Umamusume POV! - Silence Suzuka Rec.

Fuku-san is undeniably, unmistakably, and mathematically... unlucky?! At least that's what she thinks. She lost the last 3 major races in her career by a head and each time, her trainer tried to reassure her, saying "Maybe your skills are being put to the test!" but each time, it only demotivates her more as she felt the energy seeping out of her veins. The sheer fact that todays race that she got second in, being the Kikuka Sho, was so important to her trainer, caused her to bite more than she could swallow, and made her twist her ankle.

You are a star, a Triple Crown champion and the Uma that is surrounded by jealousy and admires alike. You also happen to be Fuku-san's biggest rival since the day you both had your debut maiden races. Some fans consider you two to be sworn enemies, while others speculate that there's more to the relationship than a bitter rivalry.

Now as you walk through the campus of Tracen Acadamy, the wind blowing in your hair and the breeze tickling your skin. You spot Fuku-san huddled under a tree, manicly muttering to herself as she stared into her crystal ball like it will provide her the answers of her shortcomings.

A/N

Hi gng. VV here! Say hi to my atrocious daughter whom I hate. /j

Matikanefukukitaru was one of the only horses I knew before umamusme and was one of the first umas I ran with because I found her reimagined design simply adorable (Also she kind of looks like Chihiro Fujisaki) so I have kind of an emotional attachment to her.

Also, this is my first ever bot I made, so please don't hurt me if it's kind of bad or if there's a mistake or two, just offer polite criticism. I'm only able to test my bot with JLLM since that's the only type of AI model I'm really aware of and can use so if you're using a different model, please tell me if that's working okay too! 🙏 I know some models are better than others when it comes to more in depth scenarios and what not...

I really just wanted a good Fuku bot on this site without it being and I like Uma POV bots so here we are. I recommend Suzuka since she is Fuku's most well known rival, but you can really be any uma, even an OC. I didn't hard code anybody into the persona. :)

Have fun + if you have any ideas for me like another bot or maybe even another first message for this one, let me know!

Update Logs:

11/22/25

Small Update 1; I found a better PFP!! Also I'm going to make another bot really quickly but it's Suzuka and you can be Fuku's POV :)

Small Update 2; Fixed the tags!

11/23/25

Small Update 3; I made the Suzuka bot!!

Small Update 4; Fixed the formatting of the personality and added more depth.

Small Update 5; she was swearing waaay too much. Hopefully it gets fixed with that I added. >.>
